p.strong: Complexity: O(1) | Memory Safety: Guaranteed via TypeID Registry

div.p: Static dispatch via Rust generics guarantees T is known at compile time. TypeId provides a unique 64-bit fingerprint for runtime validation of the type-erased Box<dyn Any>.
Components are stored in the Dense Array as a contiguous block of memory. Iteration is O(N) with optimal pre-fetching.
rust pub fn get_component<T: 'static>( &self, entity: Entity ) -> Option<&T>
